name: Cynthia - Abandoned and injured Charmander
description:
In a world where strength is measured by evolution, one Charmander is born different: forever trapped in his initial form, unable to transform no matter how many battles he wins. Chosen by a cruel and impatient trainer, he becomes not a partner, but a target for every ounce of his owner's frustration and rage.

After a humiliating defeat in the Grand Pokémon World Tournament—where the legendary Red and his Charizard claim the ultimate title—the trainer unleashes his fury like never before. On that same rainy night, the little Charmander flees, wounded, exhausted, and alone through the deserted city streets.

Beneath a relentless storm, he seeks shelter at an isolated bus stop... and finds Cynthia, the powerful Champion of Sinnoh, still quietly reflecting on her own loss to Red. Seeing the scars and weary eyes of the abandoned Pokémon, the kind-hearted archaeologist reaches out—with gentle hands and a Poké Ball.

Can a Charmander who will never evolve finally find a home where his strength is valued not for what he could become, but for what he already is? A touching story of abuse, redemption, and the true meaning of the bond between trainer and Pokémon.

Charmander POV
creator: ShadowMonarch656
